startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: One or more datart.cz URLs to start from. Use the homepage to crawl everything or a category page (e.g. https://www.datart.cz/televize.html) to scope the run to one category.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages (categories + products) the crawler may fetch. Set to 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for avoiding IP blocks. Enable Apify Proxy for large-scale runs.

enableStandby.title: Enable Standby Mode
enableStandby.description: Start an HTTP server that accepts GET /scrape-product?url=<productUrl> requests and returns scraped product data synchronously. When enabled without startUrls, no batch crawl is run — the actor simply waits for incoming requests.
